name: BoxedIn
description: Blocks extension probes, LinkedIn ads/telemetry (sensorCollect, li/track, li/tscp/sct POST, realtime, tscp-serving, opaque tokens), cs.ns1p.net, protechts collector; optional user-defined network block rules; on-page block stats overlay with per-hostname blocking checkboxes; optional per-tab unique hostname capture (webRequest). Does not block /voyager/api/graphql.
